title: CSIR CEERI – Technical Officer and Technician – 22 Posts
shortInfo: CSIR-Central Electronics Engineering Research Institute (CSIR CEERI) Recruitment 2026 for 22 posts of Technical Officer and Technician. Candidates with 10th, ITI, B.E./B.Tech., M.Sc., MCA Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 21-05-2026, and closes on 20-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CSIR CEERI official website ceeri.res.in.

basic_details.job_title: CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 22 Technical Officer and Technician Posts
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-Central Electronics Engineering Research Institute (CSIR CEERI) Recruitment 2026 for 22 posts of Technical Officer and Technician. Candidates with 10th, ITI, B.E./B.Tech., M.Sc., MCA Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 21-05-2026, and closes on 20-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CSIR CEERI official website ceeri.res.in.

age_limit.age_details: Minimum age is 18 years. Upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 10 years for PwBDs.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 7 (₹89,268/- Approx.) for Technical Officer and Pay Level-2 (₹19,900-₹63,200) for Technician.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR CEERI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: CSIR-Central Electronics Engineering Research Institute Technical Officer
